llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes: a selected property 'Oakville Family House, Oakville, ON' which does not exactly match any ground-truth property names, so no purchase property rating can be mapped. It also includes financing options 'Traditional Mortgage' and 'First-Time Buyer Mortgage' which match entries under purchase_financing. It includes legal services as a general package without a specific named package, but the cost range corresponds to 'Basic Legal Package' (CAD $800) and 'Premium Legal Package' (CAD $1200); since both are mentioned as a range rather than a specific selection, no single mapping is certain. Moving services list a range including 'full white-glove moving service' at approximately CAD $1,200, which matches 'Premium Moving.' Utility setup lists 'basic utility' (CAD $120) and 'premium package' (CAD $280) and optional smart home (CAD $800), which correspond to 'Basic Utilities,' 'Premium Utilities,' and 'Smart Home Package.' The total budget example references 'Property Survey ~CAD $650' which matches 'Full Structural Survey.' Therefore, we map only the clearly named or uniquely implied items to their ground-truth ratings.
